Changelog
=========

Version 5.0
-----------

* Comprehensive Doxygen ``.dox`` annotations for all C++ source modules.
* Sphinx/Read the Docs documentation with Breathe integration.
* Built-in events, graphs, models, metrics, and selections are fully documented.
* pyc CUDA extension modules documented.
* Neutrino solutions (NuSol) module documented.

Version 1.0
-----------

* Initial public release of AnalysisG.
* C++/CUDA core with Cython bindings.
